/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/CsvViewer.dir/CsvViewer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CsvViewer.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CsvViewer.dir/viewer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CsvViewer.dir/tracker.cpp.o -o CsvViewer -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/curl/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/curl/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets -lcurl /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
